plugins.name: φ-Synth
plugins.description: 7 φ-tuned oscillators with sacred geometry modulation. Sound that evolves forever.
plugins.longDescription: φ-Synth harnesses the golden ratio across every dimension: oscillator frequencies, envelope curves, and LFO rates all follow φ proportions. The result is sound that feels naturally cohesive, with harmonics that resolve to mathematical perfection. Layer 7 independent oscillators, each tuned to sacred geometry intervals, and sculpt infinite soundscapes.

plugins.name: Metatron Reverb
plugins.description: Reverb engineered through Metatron's Cube geometry. Infinite depth.
plugins.longDescription: Metatron Reverb reimagines spatial processing through sacred geometry. The impulse response is calculated from Metatron's Cube proportions, creating a reverb that is simultaneously precise and infinitely deep. Every reflection follows harmonic principles that reinforce your mix rather than muddy it.

plugins.name: Flower EQ
plugins.description: 6-band EQ with Flower of Life frequency mapping. Precision beauty.
plugins.longDescription: Flower EQ maps each band to the 6 petals of the Flower of Life pattern, aligning your mix with sacred geometry proportions. The frequency centers follow golden ratio intervals, making it impossible to create harsh or discordant EQ shapes. 12dB range per band with smooth, musical curves.

plugins.name: Torus Delay
plugins.description: Torus-geometry delay with φ-proportioned feedback. Infinite spirals.
plugins.longDescription: Torus Delay processes audio through a torus topology, with feedback times calculated from the golden ratio. Each echo spirals through space in mathematically perfect proportions. Tap tempo, 4 independent delay lines, and feedback decay that follows harmonic rules rather than linear decay.

plugins.name: Crystal Comp
plugins.description: Compressor tuned to crystalline ratios. Transparent presence.
plugins.longDescription: Crystal Comp applies compression curves based on crystal lattice geometry, resulting in a compressor that is simultaneously transparent and present. The attack and release curves follow harmonic proportions, preventing the squashed sound of traditional compressors. Perfect for vocals, drums, and mix bus.
